text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka's training is proceeding well, though today something
else seems to be on her mind.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Phew. A 0.1-second improvement. If only everything could go as smoothly as my running... Sigh...
choice_data_list:
Was there an issue with some of the other
training?

Was there an issue with some of the other
training?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, no. It's not training that's the issue.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
There's actually a fan event this weekend that I'm a bit worried
about...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I've only ever focused on running, so I'm not really used to anything
else.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't think of a response the last time a fan tried to speak with
me. It was like the room was spinning, but it turns out...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I was the one spinning. There was even a magazine article about how I
just started veering left, walking in a little circle whenever somebody
talked to me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but feel anxious about fan events now... What if I do
something silly again?
choice_data_list: Sounds like you get quite worked up.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, I suppose I do kind of let that happen.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to resign myself to doing these things half-heartedly...
But at the same time, I don't feel like I can do it well.
choice_data_list: Want to try practicing for it with me?
Want to try practicing for it with me?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? You mean practice... with you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, in order to help prepare her for social events, I take on the
role of an enthusiastic Suzuka fan.
choice_data_list: Your latest race was amazing! Your best ever!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... This might be harder than I thought.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Umm... To say my race was amazing... That's quite a compliment.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And "best ever"? You must have been watching my races for quite
some time... Right...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Um, that's all.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Don't try to make me feel better. It's just like I thought... it's far too
late to try to improve my social skills...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I could ever be as talkative as Fukukitaru is about
fortune telling, or adapt to any kind of conversation like Taiki can.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hopefully I can manage to force a smile and say something at least
somewhat interesting.
choice_data_list:
I'll prepare a little treat for you after it's all
done.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: A treat?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The weekend comes fast, and we find ourselves at the fan event.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Wow... I feel almost as tense as before a race, but in a completely
different way.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm definitely still a little worried about messing up... But yeah, I'll do
my best.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. Into the crowd I go. I'll be looking forward to that treat,
then.

text_block_list.name: Suzuka Fan
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka, I'm always rooting for you! You've been getting better with
every race lately!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, thank you! I'll make sure from now on to um... Uh...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I'm privileged to have you appreciate all the little ways I've
improved.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: And um... Umm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch her give it her all amongst the throngs of fans for a while
before setting out to procure the treat she chose.

text_block_list.name: Sweets Shop Staff
text_block_list.text:
The end of the queue for the Royal Honey Carrot Tart is here! The
wait time is 140 minutes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I line up at a popular cake shop in the nearby shopping mall. It
probably won't actually take 140 minutes...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Four hours... Did you really have to wait here that long?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I guess the tarts have to cool down after they're done baking
too...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um, I'm really sorry. I couldn't think of a treat I wanted myself, so I
just asked for the one everyone at the academy was talking about...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But you know, it really did motivate me to do my best at the fan
event.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I mean... It's not like I was able to respond to everyone thoughtfully.
But you know...
choice_data_list: You managed to keep a positive attitude?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, I did! Much more so than usual, at least.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Before now I would always be overcome with worry about saying or
doing something embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Knowing that there was a treat waiting for me at the end allowed me
to simply do my best and work toward it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It became like a sort of finish line for me. So I approached it as such.
choice_data_list:
And sweets taste even better after working hard
for them.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I can't wait to try it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka wears a satisfied expression on her face after tackling
the day's unfamiliar challenge.
